nasb.text: You brought Your people Israel out of the land of Egypt with signs and with wonders, and with a strong hand and with an outstretched arm and with great terror;

esv.text: You brought your people Israel out of the land of Egypt with signs and wonders, with a strong hand and outstretched arm, and with great terror.

cnv.text: 你曾用神蹟奇事、有力的手、伸出來的膀臂，和大而可畏的事，把你的子民以色列從埃及地領出來。

ccb.text: 你伸出臂膀用大能的手行神迹奇事及可畏的事，领你的子民出了埃及。
